name: designos
description: Home of the DesignOS plugin: a complete design-intelligence operating system for AI coding agents, with a deterministic review gate and an eval protocol that keeps its claims honest.

plugins.name: designos
plugins.description: Design intelligence for any UI task: routed craft modules (components, industries, patterns, foundations, psychology, motion), 9 review personas, the deterministic designos review/audit gate with WCAG-computing validators, and honest self-scoring rules — never claim a score the gate didn't produce.
